titles.title: Life Is Like a Mountain Railroad (Life's a Railroad to Heaven)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Bless'd Savior, Thou wilt guide us, Till we reach that blissful shore; Where the angels wait to join us In Thy praise forevermore.

verse.name: v3
v4
v5
verse.lines: As you roll across the trestle, spanning Jordan's swelling tide, You behold the Union Depot into which your train will glide; There you'll meet the Superintendent, God the Father, God the Son, With the hearty, joyous, plaudit, "Weary pilgrim, welcome home!"
